title: Selection on Testing Engagement: A Structural Bias in Cross-Sectional Incidence Estimation Using Recency Assays
description: Analysis and visualization pipeline for the Demidont extension of the Kassanjee/Gao cross-sectional HIV incidence estimator under structural censoring. Implements the effective MDRI correction Omega*(gamma), the joint IRR bias factor B_IRR, and applies the framework to 34 high-burden US metropolitan areas using AIDSVu 2023 surveillance data. Includes manuscript LaTeX sources, generated figures, processed data tables, and reproducibility scaffolding.
